title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind researchers at Cambridge use AI tools including AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to accelerate drug discovery against antimicrobial-resistant bacteria by decoding bacterial defense mechanisms. The approach compresses analysis that previously took years into minutes, addressing the challenge of rising antibiotic resistance.
